scripts.assurance:check: npm run schema:generate && npm --prefix frontend run check && ./scripts/with-local-zlib.sh cabal test reactive-english-test && ./scripts/build-proofs.sh
scripts.build: npm run schema:generate && npm run frontend:build && ./scripts/with-local-zlib.sh cabal build all
scripts.dev: npm run schema:generate && concurrently -k -n front,back "npm run frontend:watch" "npm run backend:run"
